categories.name: Form Presets
categories.description: One-click presets for government form uploads

categories.name: Image Tools
categories.description: Resize, crop, convert, and enhance images

categories.name: PDF Tools
categories.description: Create, compress, split, and merge PDFs

tools.name: Passport Photo Upload
tools.description: Auto-converts to JPG and compresses to under 50KB for passport portals.

tools.name: Signature Upload
tools.description: Compresses signature images to strictly under 20KB.

tools.name: Government ID / Document
tools.description: Scales and compresses ID scans or documents to under 200KB.

tools.name: Image Resizer & Capper
tools.description: Scale dimensions and iteratively compress until a target file size is met.

tools.name: Image Cropper & Format Converter
tools.description: Rotate, crop with aspect ratios, and convert between PNG, JPG, and WEBP.

tools.name: Ink-Saver / Contrast Booster
tools.description: Clean signature captures with high-contrast black ink on a white background.

tools.name: Smart ID Stitcher
tools.description: Merge front and back ID scans side-by-side or stacked on one sheet.

tools.name: Images-to-PDF Studio
tools.description: Arrange image thumbnails and export them as a multi-page PDF.

tools.name: PDF Compressor
tools.description: Re-encode embedded images in PDFs to hit strict upload size limits.

tools.name: Split & Merge PDF
tools.description: Extract individual pages or combine multiple PDFs into one file.

tools.name: Clipboard Text Sanitizer
tools.description: Clean copied text by trimming spaces, fixing line wraps, and normalizing casing.
